hook.summary: Intense mech combat featuring a heavy robot firing dual rocket launchers at enemy targets.
hook.visual_action: A green multi-legged mech fires rockets continuously at enemy robots in an industrial setting.

scene_flow: Mech robot initiates heavy rocket fire against multiple enemy targets in an industrial arena.
Continuous bombardment causes explosions and visible damage to the opposing robots.
The mech advances through the environment while maintaining a steady stream of fire.
Transition to a dark end screen with a high-contrast call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers 18-35 who enjoy sci-fi combat and mech-based action games.
